series_metadata.series_description: Files collected and provided to the Commission on Accreditation for Law Enforcement Agencies (CALEA) by applicable sections of the Ohio Attorney General's Office to attain accreditation for compliance with public safety agency standards. Records include, but are not limited to, work-load assessments, inspections, reports, and work product.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from awarding accreditation. ; Paper: from awarding accreditation. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
